# PERF-189 negative: drain happens before close
lang: go
file: PERF-189-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	resp, _ := http.Get("https://example.com")
	if resp != nil {
		io.Copy(io.Discard, resp.Body)
		resp.Body.Close()
	}
}
